mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Martha A. Conner
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Martha A. Conner John H. Pritterman, Administrator Before her death he had been her committee, "she being of unknown mind". After her death he was her administrator. Recorded in Ledger Book 4, page 472-473, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
